option.name: filePath
option.value: /build.gradle (snapshot).kts

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
filePath
option.value: /fragment_rest (snapshot).xml

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- TextInputLayout para el ID del Post --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilPostId" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_post_id">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etPostId" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="number" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Botón Consultar --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnFetch" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:text="@string/btn_fetch" />
<!-- ProgressBar Circular --> <com.google.android.material.progressindicator.CircularProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/progressBar" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:indeterminate="true" android:visibility="gone" />
<!-- TextInputLayout para el Título --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilTitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" app:hint="@string/hint_title">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etTitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:enabled="false" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- TextInputLayout para el Cuerpo del Post (multiline) --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilBody" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:hint="@string/hint_body">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etBody" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="150dp" android:enabled="false" android:gravity="top" android:inputType="textMultiLine" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Botón Actualizar (inicialmente deshabilitado) --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnUpdate" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:enabled="false" android:text="@string/btn_update" />
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- TextInputLayout para el ID del Post --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilPostId" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_post_id">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etPostId" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="number" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Botón Consultar --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnFetch" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:text="@string/btn_fetch" />
<!-- ProgressBar Circular --> <com.google.android.material.progressindicator.CircularProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/progressBar" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:indeterminate="true" android:visibility="gone" />
<!-- TextInputLayout para el Título --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilTitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_title">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etTitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:enabled="false" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- TextInputLayout para el Cuerpo del Post (multiline) --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilBody" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" app:hint="@string/hint_body">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etBody" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="150dp" android:enabled="false" android:gravity="top" android:inputType="textMultiLine" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Botón Actualizar (inicialmente deshabilitado) --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnUpdate" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:enabled="false" android:text="@string/btn_update" />
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: filePath
option.value: /libs.versions (snapshot).toml

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.MyApplication"> <activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
<category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity> </application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<!-- Permiso para acceder a Internet para las solicitudes HTTP --> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.MyApplication"> <activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
<category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity> </application>
</manifest>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
option.value:
package com.example.myapplication
// Este archivo está deprecado. Ver com.example.redyseguridad.MainActivity

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
package com.example.redyseguridad.model
/** * Data class que representa un Post de JSONPlaceholder. * Se parsea manualmente desde JSONObject sin usar librerías como Gson o Moshi. * * @param id Identificador único del post * @param userId ID del usuario que creó el post * @param title Título del post * @param body Contenido/cuerpo del post */ data class Post( val id: Int, val userId: Int, val title: String, val body: String )

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="@android:color/darker_gray" /> <corners android:radius="4dp" /> </shape>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/main" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".MainActivity">
<TextView android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Hello World!" app:layout_constraintBottom_toBottomOf="parent" app:layout_constraintEnd_toEndOf="parent" app:layout_constraintStart_toStartOf="parent" app:layout_constraintTop_toTopOf="parent" />
</androidx.constraintlayout.widget.ConstraintLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- NavHostFragment que actúa como contenedor de los fragments --> <androidx.fragment.app.FragmentContainerView android:id="@+id/nav_host_fragment" android:name="androidx.navigation.fragment.NavHostFragment" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" app:defaultNavHost="true" app:navGraph="@navigation/nav_graph" />
<!-- BottomNavigationView para navegar entre fragmentos --> <com.google.android.material.bottomnavigation.BottomNavigationView android:id="@+id/bottom_navigation" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" app:menu="@menu/bottom_nav_menu" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- TextInputLayout para el ID del Post --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilPostId" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_post_id">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etPostId" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:inputType="number" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Botón Consultar --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnFetch" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:text="@string/btn_fetch" />
<!-- ProgressBar Circular --> <com.google.android.material.progressindicator.CircularProgressIndicator android:id="@+id/progressBar" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_horizontal" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:indeterminate="true" android:visibility="gone" />
<!-- TextInputLayout para el Título --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilTitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_title">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etTitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:enabled="false" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- TextInputLayout para el Cuerpo del Post (multiline) --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilBody" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:hint="@string/hint_body">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etBody" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="150dp" android:enabled="false" android:gravity="top" android:inputType="textMultiLine" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- Botón Actualizar (inicialmente deshabilitado) --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnUpdate" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:enabled="false" android:text="@string/btn_update" />
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<ScrollView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical">
<!-- TextInputLayout para la Clave --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilKey" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:hint="@string/hint_key">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etKey" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- TextInputLayout para el Valor --> <com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout android:id="@+id/tilValue" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:hint="@string/hint_value">
<com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputEditText android:id="@+id/etValue" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" />
</com.google.android.material.textfield.TextInputLayout>
<!-- RadioGroup para seleccionar el tipo de almacenamiento --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/tab_storage" android:textStyle="bold" />
<RadioGroup android:id="@+id/rgStorageType" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<RadioButton android:id="@+id/rbSharedPrefs" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:checked="true" android:text="@string/rb_shared_prefs" />
<RadioButton android:id="@+id/rbDataStore" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/rb_data_store" />
<RadioButton android:id="@+id/rbEncrypted" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/rb_encrypted" />
</RadioGroup>
<!-- Botón Guardar --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnSave" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:text="@string/btn_save" />
<!-- Botón Recuperar --> <com.google.android.material.button.MaterialButton android:id="@+id/btnRetrieve" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:text="@string/btn_retrieve" style="@style/Widget.MaterialComponents.Button.OutlinedButton" />
<!-- Separador --> <View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" android:background="?attr/colorOnBackground" />
<!-- Label para Resultado --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/result_label" android:textStyle="bold" />
<!-- TextView para mostrar el resultado recuperado --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tvResult" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:background="@drawable/bg_result" android:padding="12dp" android:text="" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSecondary" />
</LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <menu xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"> <item android:id="@+id/nav_rest" android:icon="@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground" android:title="@string/tab_rest" /> <item android:id="@+id/nav_storage" android:icon="@drawable/ic_launcher_foreground" android:title="@string/tab_storage" /> </menu>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <navigation xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/nav_graph" app:startDestination="@id/nav_rest">
<!-- Fragment REST (destino inicial) --> <fragment android:id="@+id/nav_rest" android:name="com.example.redyseguridad.ui.rest.RestFragment" android:label="@string/tab_rest" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_rest" />
<!-- Fragment Storage --> <fragment android:id="@+id/nav_storage" android:name="com.example.redyseguridad.ui.storage.StorageFragment" android:label="@string/tab_storage" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_storage" />
</navigation>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">My Application</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<resources> <string name="app_name">RedySeguridad</string>
<!-- REST Fragment --> <string name="tab_rest">Red REST</string> <string name="hint_post_id">ID del Post</string> <string name="btn_fetch">Consultar</string> <string name="hint_title">Título</string> <string name="hint_body">Cuerpo del Post</string> <string name="btn_update">Actualizar</string> <string name="loading">Cargando...</string> <string name="post_updated">✓ Post actualizado correctamente</string> <string name="error_loading">Error al cargar: </string> <string name="error_invalid_id">Por favor ingresa un ID válido</string>
<!-- Storage Fragment --> <string name="tab_storage">Almacenamiento</string> <string name="hint_key">Clave</string> <string name="hint_value">Valor</string> <string name="btn_save">Guardar Secreto</string> <string name="btn_retrieve">Recuperar Secreto</string> <string name="rb_shared_prefs">SharedPreferences</string> <string name="rb_data_store">Jetpack DataStore</string> <string name="rb_encrypted">EncryptedSharedPreferences</string> <string name="saved_successfully">✓ Guardado correctamente</string> <string name="secret_not_found">Secreto no encontrado</string> <string name="result_label">Resultado:</string> <string name="error_empty_key">Por favor ingresa una clave</string> <string name="error_empty_value">Por favor ingresa un valor</string>
<!-- Network Errors --> <string name="error_bad_response">Error en la respuesta del servidor</string> <string name="error_io_exception">Error de conexión</string> <string name="error_invalid_json">Error al procesar la respuesta JSON</string> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
